chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1277 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5432/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.08.2024 M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Atiq-ur-Rehman Shaikh and Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocates for the petitioner M/s Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro and Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocates for respondents No.1 and 2 Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director, Election Commission of Pakistan Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>...<<<<<<< After hearing the leaned counsel for the parties at some length, this petition is disposed of with direction to the Election Tribunal to hear the main Election Petition No.01/2022 still pending before it, ab-initio, frame issues, and after recording of evidence, decide the same in accordance with the law within the stipulated period. However, also add an issue as to the very maintainability of the said petition and pass a final order / judgment without being prejudice by the findings given in the impugned order dated 12.08.2023 (Pages 15-27), which is hereby set-aside. Judge Judge ARBROHI
